name: Naomi Sharon · OVO — Website overhaul (development) · Invoice

content.title: Naomi Sharon · OVO
content.subtitle: Website overhaul · Creative direction + development (invoice)
content.body:
This document is the client-facing invoice and scope record: web design direction (shared creative deck), application approach, and invoiced investment for a full-site overhaul of naomisharon.com — the rebuild coordinated with MOWA. Delivery dates follow album rollout, MOWA coordination, and label gates; the timeline slide shows an illustrative schedule only (TBD).

Initial visual mockups can proceed in parallel with rollout planning; a full public flip stays gated until album creative and artwork are announced, per label.

content.title: Brand system — logos & typography
content.subtitle: From the client web design document — lock-ups and cover type

gridItems.label: Logos / lock-ups
gridItems.value: Use approved logo and lock-up treatments consistently across the site and digital extensions; any web-specific variants to be confirmed during discovery with final brand assets.

gridItems.label: Album cover typography
gridItems.value: No Sleep In Paradise — Helvetica Neue LT Pro 45 Light (modified flatter). Artist line — Helvetica Neue LT Pro 55 Roman, tracking 300.

gridItems.label: Miss That cover typography
gridItems.value: Title — Helvetica Neue LT Pro 45 Light (modified flatter). Artist — Antique Olive Light, vertically stretched.

content.body: Color values and full swatch specs live in the design PDF; confirm hex/RGB in Figma or source files where the PDF uses raster swatches.

content.title: Creative pillars — website experience
content.subtitle: Motion, immersion, and alignment with Naomi’s visual world

gridItems.label: Motion-first
gridItems.value: Less static imagery across the site; lean on relevant motion assets within Naomi’s distinct visual aesthetic.

gridItems.label: Landing direction
gridItems.value: Water covering the home screen, naturally fading and revealing navigation overlaid on top of an animated hero asset.

gridItems.label: Audio / video
gridItems.value: New navigation patterns on video and audio pages beyond a flat grid — more immersive, highlighting visuals (cover-image navigation).

content.body: Each video project can open as an on-site player when clicked, before sending users to an external YouTube link — “on-site visualizers” as a first-class pattern.

content.title: Moodboard & consistency
content.subtitle: Creative lift and typography across digitals
content.body:
The visual world of the site should align completely with Naomi’s most recent projects — giving existing assets a creative lift rather than recycling flat grids.

Typography across digitals must stay cohesive with the new rollout; album-cover typography choices should inform site headings and key UI where appropriate.

gridItems.label: Exploration A
gridItems.value: Water running down with imagery emerging underneath.

gridItems.label: Exploration B
gridItems.value: Hallway / passage through retreat — spatial, cinematic movement.

content.title: Recommended application stack
content.subtitle: Grounded in the current official site — final choices confirmed in discovery
content.body: The live property is already a fast SvelteKit app with static release art, Feature.fm smartlinks, and embedded media. The overhaul deepens motion, navigation, and content structure in lockstep with MOWA on the rebuild — CMS changes stay scoped in discovery.

gridItems.label: Content
gridItems.value: Start with structured data in-repo or a headless source (e.g. Sanity) if the team needs frequent updates without deploys — scoped in discovery.

gridItems.label: Frontend
gridItems.value: SvelteKit + Vite — SSR/SSG, one codebase for the overhaul; progressive enhancement for video embeds and reduced-motion preferences.

gridItems.label: MOWA & delivery
gridItems.value: Implementation and handoff coordinated with MOWA for the rebuild; static or edge hosting (e.g. Cloudflare Pages) with preview/staging; Git handoff at milestones.

content.title: Timeline
content.subtitle: Illustrative only — concrete dates TBD with label milestones
content.body: A concrete week-by-week schedule is not committed here — dates follow album rollout, MOWA coordination, and label gates. The chart above is illustrative only (TBD).

content.title: Discovery — outcomes to confirm
content.subtitle: Before locking build scope and launch timing
content.body: Use this checklist in workshops so motion, IA, and rollout gates match what ships.

gridItems.label: Hero & motion
gridItems.value: Water/hero treatment — asset format, loop length, performance budget, and reduced-motion fallback.

gridItems.label: Music & video IA
gridItems.value: Cover-image navigation model; on-site player vs. outbound YouTube; grid vs. immersive layouts per breakpoint.

gridItems.label: CMS vs. Git
gridItems.value: Who updates copy and artwork post-launch; whether editorial needs warrant Sanity (or similar) vs. continued structured updates.

gridItems.label: Rollout gate
gridItems.value: What ships privately or in staging until album creative is public; comms checklist with label.

gridItems.label: Analytics & embeds
gridItems.value: Feature.fm, mailing list, and any third-party scripts — consent and performance.

content.title: Investment — invoiced line items
content.subtitle: Mowalola creative direction and current work (USD) — discovery, build with MOWA on the rebuild, editor handoff, QA, and go-live as scoped

tableRows.What's covered: Creative direction and alignment with the shared web design deck for the Naomi Sharon overhaul; scoped deliverables per agreement

SvelteKit implementation (navigation, hero/motion, music/video templates); coordination with MOWA on the rebuild; content editor or agreed update path; QA; staging and production deploy through go-live for scope locked with this invoice
Extra pages/features, large CMS expansion, or work outside what we lock at kickoff — scoped before build
Optional monthly retainer after launch — first months waived if agreed

content.body: Invoiced line items on this deck: $2,000 for Mowalola creative direction and $1,000 for current implementation work (SvelteKit build, MOWA coordination, editor path, QA, deploy) as scoped above. Anything outside that locked scope is quoted before we start.

content.title: Scope highlights
content.subtitle: What the overhaul delivers when we align to this deck
content.body: Immersive home and inner pages that reflect Naomi’s current visual era; motion-led storytelling with accessible fallbacks; discography and video surfaces that feel premium and navigable on mobile and desktop; integration with existing smartlinks and embeds; staging for pre-announcement review; rebuild delivery aligned with MOWA — covered under the invoiced line items when scope matches this deck.

gridItems.label: Configuration
gridItems.value: Clear split between design-approved tokens (type, color, motion) and implementation in code.

gridItems.label: Empty states
gridItems.value: Graceful handling when optional promo assets are withheld until announcement.

gridItems.label: Handoff
gridItems.value: Repository access, deploy notes, and editor or README handoff depending on CMS decision.
